rows.Name: Fruit
rows.Info: Has a chance to drop from slain enemies, and always drops from trees unless it drops a Crate. Heals 3 HP when picked up.

rows.Name: Crate
rows.Info: Has a chance to drop from slain enemies, and has a 20% to drop after a Tree is destroyed. Heals 3 HP when picked up.

rows.Name: Legendary Crate
rows.Info: Drops exclusively from Elites that spawn in Danger 2 and above & Bosses that spawn on wave 20. Doesn't drop from Elites and Bosses killed on later waves in Endless Mode. Always contains a Tier 4 (Red/Legendary) Item. Heals 100HP.

rows.Name: Cauldron(DLC)
rows.Effects: +50% pickup range +20 % Damage for 2 seconds after picking up a consumable -2 HP Regeneration

rows.Name: Extra Stomach
rows.Effects: +1 Max HP when picking up a consumable while at maximum health (max +8 per wave)

rows.Name: Fruit Basket
rows.Effects: Enemies have a higher chance of dropping fruits -3 HP Regeneration
rows.Unlocked By: Collect 100 fruits while at maximum health

rows.Name: Garden
rows.Effects: Spawns a garden that creates a fruit every 15 seconds

rows.Name: Jerky(DLC)
rows.Effects: +3 HP recovered from consumables Consumables heal you over 4 seconds instead of instantly

rows.Name: Spicy Sauce
rows.Effects: +3 Max HP Consumables have a 50% chance to explode for 10 (+100%) damage when picked up

rows.Name: Alien Worm
rows.Effects: +3 Max HP +2 HP Regeneration -1 HP recovered from consumables

rows.Name: Torture
rows.Effects: +15 Max HP Restore 5 HP per second. Cannot heal any other way.

rows.Name: Bag
rows.Effects: +15 materials when you pick up a crate -1 % Speed

rows.Name: Chunky
rows.Stats: Max HP modifications are increased by 25%  +1% Damage for every 3 Max HP you have +3 HP recovered from consumables -100% Life Steal HP Regeneration modifications are reduced by 50%  Dodge modifications are reduced by 50% Speed modifications are reduced by 100%

rows.Name: Druid(DLC)
rows.Stats: +5 Max HP +15 Luck Enemies have a higher chance of dropping fruits 33% chance to get +1 Luck when you pick up a fruit 33% of fruits are poisoned and hurt you (ignores Dodge and Armor) -100 HP Regeneration -100 % Life Steal Engineering modifications are reduced by 50%
rows.Unlocked By: Collect 250 consumables by the end of wave 20

rows.Name: Farmer
rows.Stats: +20 Harvesting Harvesting increases by an additional 3% at the end of a wave +1 Harvesting when eating a consumable while at full health  -50% materials dropped

rows.Name: Glutton
rows.Stats: +50 Luck +1 % Explosion Damage when picking up a consumable while at maximum health Consumable have a 100% chance to explode for 10 (500% ) damage when picked up +25 % Items Price -25 % XP Gain
rows.Unlocked By: Pick up 20 consumables during a run

rows.Name: Pruner
rows.Special Effects: Spawns a garden that creates a fruit every 15/14/12/10 seconds
